title: Step-by-Step Guide to Adding gRPC to go-simple 🚀
subtitle: Define the gRPC API with Protocol Buffers
excerpt: Define the gRPC API with Protocol Buffers

content.text: 📦 Define the gRPC API with Protocol Buffers

content.html: The commit added product.proto in api/proto/product/v1, defining the ProductService with full CRUD support:
This schema was compiled using protoc, generating:

content.alt: Step-by-Step Guide to Adding gRPC to go-simple 🚀

content.html: The file internal/product/controller/grpc.go was added to wrap the existing product service logic in gRPC handlers:
Each RPC method (e.g. GetProductByID, CreateProduct) maps to the corresponding service method, ensuring consistent behavior across HTTP and gRPC.

content.text: 3. 🛠️ Setup the gRPC Server with Uber FX

content.html: The file internal/server/grpc.go defines NewGRPCServer, which registers the gRPC service and starts the server using FX lifecycle hooks:
This allows the server to start automatically when the app runs.
The commit also added test/product_grpc_test.go, which tests the GetProductByID method using a real gRPC client:
This ensures the gRPC server is correctly wired and responds as expected.

items: go.mod and go.sum to include gRPC and protobuf dependencies
buf.gen.yaml to configure code generation with protoc-gen-go and protoc-gen-go-grpc

content.code:
version: v2plugins:  - local: protoc-gen-go    out: gen/go    opt:      - paths=source_relative  -
local: protoc-gen-go-grpc    out: gen/go    opt:      - paths=source_relative
